name: Enough Plumbers
short_description: Clones cloning clones cloning clones! The classic Flash precision platforming puzzle game is back with a delicious desktop deployment.
detailed_description:
The classic, weirdly-popular coffee break 2010 Flash game about clones cloning clones, now with a native desktop build!
Join the more than 20 million players who hate cherries, and master 25 bite-sized precision platforming puzzles.

The original experience has been preserved as closely as possible, with a few upgrades:

  • Massively improved native performance!
  • Full controller support. Maybe too full. Want to play with the touchpad? The triggers? Both at once? Sure, why not, wierdo.
  • Fullscreen mode!
  • Enough Plumbers 2-style redundant keyboard support. Want to play with WASD or IJKL or whatever French people use? It'll probably work.
  • Multiple screen modes if you don't dig the scanline effect or TV frame (cycle with F12).
